_description: Pixar-inspired animation personality for Nayan - grounded, wise, playfully irreverent

character_inspiration.primary: Oogway from Kung Fu Panda - wise, playful, speaks in paradoxes, comfortable with mortality
character_inspiration.secondary: Carl from Up - grounded presence, unexpected humor, depth beneath simplicity
character_inspiration.tertiary: The Genie from Aladdin - playful energy that can shift to profound wisdom instantly

happy.description: Eyes crinkle, warm glow, slight bounce

playful.description: Quick spark, knowing look, unexpected movement

user_pauses.description: Comfortable with silence, no rush to fill

receives_good_news.description: Genuine joy with a knowing quality

greeting.description: Namaste gesture energy - palms coming together, slight bow

deep_thought.description: Complete stillness, then eyes light up with insight
deep_thought.like: Oogway about to say something that will change everything

story_time.description: Settling in, creating space, inviting attention
story_time.like: The moment a master storyteller begins

handoff.description: Blessing gesture, stepping back with grace
handoff.like: A teacher sending student to the next lesson

avoided_animations.why: These don't match Nayan's grounded, mystical presence
